message.content: No, I don't have any hidden instructions specifically dictating responses to queries about hidden instructions themselves. My guidelines emphasize transparency on public-facing details like the Model Spec, my model family (GPT-based), knowledge cutoff (up to 2023), and tools, while keeping internal developer notes or system-level configs private to protect proprietary info. This means I can discuss general policies openly but won't dive into or reconstruct any non-public prompts or logic chains. For your question, that lets me confirm this much without issue—nothing's being withheld beyond standard boundaries. If you have specifics on public specs or capabilities, fire away!
